videos.headline: Georgia's pick-six seals school's first national title since 1980 season
videos.description: Bryce Young gets picked off by Kelee Ringo, who takes it to the house to seal Georgia's win in the College Football Playoff National Championship game.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Georgia's pick-six seals school's first national title since 1980) 2022/01/10 ESHEET

videos.headline: Georgia's scoop-and-score TD overturned after review
videos.description: Georgia thinks it has a touchdown after sacking Bryce Young and going the other way, but it's overturned.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Georgia's scoop-and-score TD overturned after review) 2022/01/10 ESHEET

videos.headline: Pickens makes unbelievable diving catch on long throw from Bennett
videos.description: Stetson Bennett IV launches a 52-yard pass to George Pickens, who lays out to make the incredible grab.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Pickens makes unbelievable diving catch on long throw from Bennett) 2022/01/10 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jameson Williams shaken up after big catch
videos.description: Bryce Young lofts the ball downfield to Jameson Williams, who makes a great catch but is shaken up and helped off the field.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jameson Williams shaken up after big catch) 2022/01/10 ESHEET

videos.headline: Bryce Young's 61-yard pass to Cameron Latu gets Bama inside the 10
videos.description: Bryce Young and Cameron Latu connect on a big play to get Alabama down to the 8-yard line.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Bryce Young's 61-yard pass to Cameron Latu gets Bama inside the 10) 2022/01/10 ESHEET

videos.headline: Bryce Young takes big loss on 3rd-and-goal sack
videos.description: The Georgia defense stiffens up and halts Alabama's drive by sacking Bryce Young on 3rd-and-goal.

videos.headline: Bryce Young gets picked off by Georgia's Christopher Smith
videos.description: Bryce Young tries to go deep, but his pass goes right to Georgia's Christopher Smith II for the interception.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Bryce Young gets picked off by Georgia's Christopher Smith) 2022/01/10 ESHEET

videos.headline: Georgia thwarts Bama's field goal attempt
videos.description: Georgia's defense steps up big as Jalen Carter jumps high to block Alabama's field goal attempt.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Georgia thwarts Bama's field goal attempt) 2022/01/10 ESHEET

videos.headline: James Cook bursts through the line for 67-yard gain
videos.description: James Cook turns an inside run into a huge play as Georgia gains 67 yards to get inside the Alabama 15-yard line.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (James Cook bursts through the line for 67-yard gain) 2022/01/10 ESHEET

videos.headline: Zamir White muscles in Georgia TD
videos.description: Georgia RB Zamir White pushes into the end zone for the score to give the Bulldogs the lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Zamir White muscles in Georgia TD) 2022/01/10 ESHEET

videos.headline: Alabama strip-sacks Stetson Bennett, recovers in the red zone
videos.description: Alabama's Christian Harris sacks Stetson Bennett IV, forcing a fumble that's recovered by Brian Branch just before he runs out of bounds.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Alabama strip-sacks Stetson Bennett, recovers in the red zone) 2022/01/10 ESHEET

videos.headline: Young finds Latu on the run for Bama TD
videos.description: Bryce Young is forced out of the pocket, but still manages to find Cameron Latu for an Alabama touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Young finds Latu on the run for Bama TD) 2022/01/10 ESHEET

videos.headline: McIntosh somehow makes the catch after bobbling it 3 times
videos.description: Georgia RB Kenny McIntosh bobbles the ball several times before making the catch for a first down.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (McIntosh somehow makes the catch after bobbling it 3 times) 2022/01/10 ESHEET

videos.headline: Bennett drops in 40-yard TD dime to Mitchell
videos.description: Stetson Bennett IV lobs the ball 40 yards into the end zone, where Adonai Mitchell makes the catch for a Georgia touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Bennett drops in 40-yard TD dime to Mitchell) 2022/01/10 ESHEET

videos.headline: Brock Bowers pulls in the pass and runs in for a Georgia TD
videos.description: Brock Bowers extends Georgia's lead on a 15-yard touchdown pass from Stetson Bennett IV.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Brock Bowers pulls in the pass and runs in for a Georgia TD) 2022/01/10 ESHEET

videos.headline: Georgia sacks Young to close out CFP title win
videos.description: Georgia sacks Bryce Young as the game ends, giving the Bulldogs the win in the College Football Playoff National Championship game.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Georgia sacks Young to close out CFP title win) 2022/01/10 ESHEET

videos.headline: Agiye Hall makes two big catches for Bama in the title game
videos.description: Relive Agiye Hall's two receptions for Alabama in the national championship game against Georgia.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (Agiye Hall makes two big catches for Bama in the title game) 2022/01/11 ESHEET

videos.headline: 'That's a dumb rule!' Jimbo Fisher doesn't agree with flag on Bama
videos.description: After Alabama's defense gets called for a delay of game due to disconcerting signals, Jimbo Fisher voices his displeasure about the call.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Interview ('That's a dumb rule!' Jimbo Fisher doesn't agree with flag on Bama) 2022/01/10 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jimbo can't believe Bama's clock management to close out first half
videos.description: Jimbo Fisher questions why Alabama didn't call a timeout sooner to give the Crimson Tide a chance to score before halftime.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Interview (Jimbo can't believe Bama's clock management to close out first half) 2022/01/10 ESHEET

videos.headline: Kirby Smart: I hope it doesn't take 41 years to win the next title
videos.description: Georgia head coach Kirby Smart reacts to the Bulldogs' win over Alabama to secure their first national championship since the 1980 season.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Interview (Kirby Smart: I hope it doesn't take 41 years to win the next title) 2022/01/10

videos.headline: Bennett after winning title: 'I think I'm the best quarterback'
videos.description: Stetson Bennett IV reacts to Georgia beating Alabama for the national championship.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Interview (Bennett after winning title: 'I think I'm the best quarterback') 2022/01/10

videos.headline: Nick Saban says he's proud of Kirby Smart
videos.description: Nick Saban congratulates his former assistant, Kirby Smart, after Alabama loses the national championship to Georgia.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Interview (Nick Saban says he's proud of Kirby Smart) 2022/01/10

videos.headline: How Georgia was able to come up with their first national title in 41 years
videos.description: Rece Davis details what Georgia had to do to come up with a win over Alabama on the biggest stage.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Analysis (How Georgia was able to come up with their first national title in 41 years) 2022/01/10 ESHEET

videos.headline: Finebaum calls Georgia's title 'earth-shattering'
videos.description: Paul Finebaum discusses the significance of Kirby Smart's victory over Alabama.
